en-US.trial-default-hnt-heading: Always open sites with added privacy protection
en-US.trial-default-hnt-body: Set Firefox as your default and keep built-in privacy protection with every tab.
en-US.trial-default-hnt-heading-1: Try built-in privacy for a few days
en-US.trial-default-hnt-body-1: Firefox protects you from the start with automatic tracking protection and lots of other privacy tools. Not into it? You can switch back anytime.

de.trial-default-hnt-heading: Websites immer mit zusätzlichem Datenschutz öffnen
de.trial-default-hnt-body: Legen Sie Firefox als Standardbrowser fest und profitieren Sie bei jedem Tab vom integrierten Datenschutz.
de.trial-default-hnt-heading-1: Testen Sie den integrierten Datenschutz ein paar Tage
de.trial-default-hnt-body-1: Firefox schützt Sie von Anfang an mit automatischem Tracking-Schutz und vielen anderen Datenschutz-Werkzeugen. Gefällt Ihnen nicht? Sie können jederzeit wieder zurück wechseln.

en-CA.trial-default-hnt-heading: Always open sites with added privacy protection
en-CA.trial-default-hnt-body: Set Firefox as your default and keep built-in privacy protection with every tab.
en-CA.trial-default-hnt-heading-1: Try built-in privacy for a few days
en-CA.trial-default-hnt-body-1: Firefox protects you from the start with automatic tracking protection and lots of other privacy tools. Not into it? You can switch back anytime.

en-GB.trial-default-hnt-heading: Always open sites with added privacy protection
en-GB.trial-default-hnt-body: Set Firefox as your default and keep built-in privacy protection with every tab.
en-GB.trial-default-hnt-heading-1: Try built-in privacy for a few days
en-GB.trial-default-hnt-body-1: Firefox protects you from the start with automatic tracking protection and lots of other privacy tools. Not into it? You can switch back anytime.

fr.trial-default-hnt-heading: Ouvrez toujours les sites avec une protection de la vie privée renforcée
fr.trial-default-hnt-body: Définissez Firefox comme navigateur par défaut et profitez de la protection de la vie privée intégrée à chaque nouvel onglet.
fr.trial-default-hnt-heading-1: Testez la confidentialité intégrée pendant quelques jours
fr.trial-default-hnt-body-1: Firefox vous protège d’emblée grâce à sa protection automatique contre le pistage et à de nombreux autres outils de protection de la vie privée. Cela ne vous convient pas ? Vous pouvez revenir en arrière à tout moment.

it.trial-default-hnt-heading: Apri sempre i siti con una maggiore protezione della privacy
it.trial-default-hnt-body: Imposta Firefox come browser predefinito e approfitta della protezione della privacy integrata in ogni scheda.
it.trial-default-hnt-heading-1: Metti alla prova la protezione della privacy integrata per qualche giorno
it.trial-default-hnt-body-1: Firefox offre fin da subito una protezione automatica dal tracciamento e molti altri strumenti per la privacy. Non ti convince? Puoi tornare indietro quando vuoi.
